title: See 3 of SA’s most celebrated musicians in concert at Dias Museum
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Music lovers are invited...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Music lovers are invited to the Dias Museum for Musical Moments, a concert that brings together three of South Africa’s most celebrated musicians - soprano Zanne Stapelberg, baritone Niël Rademan and pianist Elna van der Merwe.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Music lovers are invited to the Dias Museum for Musical Moments, a concert that brings together three of South Africa’s most celebrated musicians - soprano Zanne Stapelberg, baritone Niël Rademan and pianist Elna van der Merwe."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This Friday, 23 January, this trio will unite to share their personal musical favourites."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the museum, this unique performance offers listeners a glimpse into the repertoire closest to the artists’ hearts - music that has shaped their journeys and continues to ignite their love of performance.","html":"According to the museum, this unique performance offers listeners a glimpse into the repertoire closest to the artists’ hearts - music that has shaped their journeys and continues to ignite their love of performance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The programme will include timeless arias and lyrical art songs, as well as beloved classics and unexpected gems.","html":"The programme will include timeless arias and lyrical art songs, as well as beloved classics and unexpected gems."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“With Stapelberg’s radiant soprano voice, Rademan’s rich baritone and Van der Merwe’s masterful touch at the piano, Musical Moments promises a concert of exceptional quality and heartfelt connection,” said the museum.","html":"“With Stapelberg’s radiant soprano voice, Rademan’s rich baritone and Van der Merwe’s masterful touch at the piano, Musical Moments promises a concert of exceptional quality and heartfelt connection,” said the museum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The concert will take place at 19:00. Tickets are R160 for members and R180 for non-members, and schoolchildren enter free of charge.","html":"The concert will take place at 19:00. Tickets are R160 for members and R180 for non-members, and schoolchildren enter free of charge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bookings: WhatsApp 064 963 9962 or visit Frame of Mind in the Ocean View Mall, Bland Street.","html":"Bookings: WhatsApp 064 963 9962 or visit Frame of Mind in the Ocean View Mall, Bland Street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: See 3 of SA’s most celebrated musicians in concert at Dias Museum
